meta.source: Read-only audit + decompiled cross-check + session analysis

headlineFeatures.title: Passenger seat — ride together in vehicles
headlineFeatures.summary: Both players inside the same truck or car during scripted drives instead of one driver and one teleported follower. Applies to the RoadTrip highway loop, the Pizzeria opening drive-in, and the Cabin DrivingToCabin intro.

headlineFeatures.title: Mid-game save & resume
headlineFeatures.summary: Today: both players have to start a chapter from the same point. After this lands, the host can save and the client picks up the same story state on next session.

headlineFeatures.title: Synced death and end-of-game
headlineFeatures.summary: If one of you dies or finishes the credits sequence, the other follows automatically instead of getting stranded in-scene.

bugs.title: CabinDarkScene typo — 5 sites match a name that doesn't exist
bugs.detail: The real game scene is CabinSceneDark (CabinGameManager.cs:15, :2897). The mod references "CabinDarkScene" (letters swapped) in 5 places. CoopClientCoordinator.cs:1294 has no fallback to the real name, so the client never preps cabin start prefs when entering the dark variant. The others are dead branches.

bugs.title: Reconnecting state has no exit handler
bugs.detail: SessionLifecycle.cs:169-179 defines transitions INTO Reconnecting. CoopHostCoordinator.cs:589 transitions to it on "no-scene-ready" retry exhaustion. But grep finds zero `case SessionState.Reconnecting` handlers anywhere. Once you land in Reconnecting nothing pulls you back out.

bugs.title: SceneDiscoveryManifest.IsDiscoveryOnlyScene is stale
bugs.detail: SceneSyncRegistries.cs:64-66 still flags scenes containing "Office", "Parking", or "Lot" as discovery-only. Both Office and ParkingLot now have full sync modules. Every Office/Parking scene entry logs a misleading 'discovery only' diagnostic line.

bugs.title: No ES3 save/load parity
bugs.detail: Game uses ES3 (decompiled-firstpass/ES3.cs). Zero ES3 references in the mod. If host loads a save mid-session, the client starts fresh and replays nothing. Only persistent prefs the mod touches are PlayerPrefs for the cabin-start-sequence handoff.
bugs.effort: 1–2 weeks (own milestone, needs new SaveSyncing SessionState)

bugs.title: PlayerInputState is movement-only
bugs.detail: Protocol.cs:690-700 carries MoveX/Y + LookYaw/Pitch + Jump/Crouch/Sprint. No interact / use / throw / aim / reload buttons. Story interactions go through InteractRequest routing, so this is fine for story beats but proxy animator won't get button-driven cues.

bugs.title: Audit ~18 unresolved field-name reflections
bugs.detail: RE verification found 266/284 named field reflections resolve to real declared fields. The 18 misses cluster on ParkingLotManager. Reflection helper (OfficeSceneStateSync.cs:1802-1820) silently caches null on miss so these are no-ops, not crashes — but they emit nothing for those keys.

unsyncedScenes.name: MainMenu
unsyncedScenes.impact: F11 panel works, but host/client menu choices don't sync. Could cause stale lobby state.

unsyncedScenes.name: Disclaimer
unsyncedScenes.impact: If peers hit it at different times the handshake stalls.

unsyncedScenes.name: DeathManager / respawn
unsyncedScenes.impact: DeathManager loads MainMenu — if one peer dies the other doesn't follow.

unsyncedScenes.name: CabinSceneDark depth
unsyncedScenes.impact: Several gates need a Dark variant — seated-proxy selection, NPC targeting, cabin-start-prefs.

milestones.title: Playable end-to-end (0.6.0)
milestones.subtitle: Hand to a streamer without embarrassment

milestones.title: Ride-along (0.7.0)
milestones.subtitle: Both players in the same vehicle for the drive sequences
items: Passenger seat — Cabin DrivingToCabin (flips skip-intro to ride-along)
Shared in-car camera + dialogue camera during driving

milestones.title: True full co-op (1.0.0)
milestones.subtitle: Save state, mid-session join, polish
items: ES3 save-load parity (host save → client replay, own SessionState)
Passenger seat polish across all driving scenes
PlayerInput interact/use/throw on the wire (proxy animation cues)

distribution.title: Thunderstore listing
distribution.impact: biggest blocker to mass adoption — one-click r2modman install

distribution.title: Nexus Mods listing
distribution.impact: second largest install channel, weekend effort

distribution.title: 60–120 s demo video
distribution.impact: no clip = no virality. This is the single highest-leverage item for popularity.

distribution.title: README polish (screenshots, GIF, what-works table)
distribution.impact: first impression at the Nexus/Thunderstore page

distribution.title: Streamer outreach (3–5 horror creators)
distribution.impact: one mid-tier streamer covering it can be the entire B-tier downloads pipeline

scene expansion, html roadmap integration, solving
